name: Media Stream Filters
description: Adds server-side filtering by media-stream characteristics that Jellyfin's core API can't express: video dynamic range (SDR/HDR10/HDR10+/Dolby Vision/HLG), video codec, audio codec, audio channel count, and spatial audio (Dolby Atmos / DTS:X). Exposes a paginated, BaseItemDto-compatible endpoint plus a capability endpoint for client feature-detection.
overview: Filter libraries by video range, codecs, audio channels, and spatial audio.

versions.changelog: - Initial release. - Resolution (isHd/is4K) passthrough for client filtering.
